data.title: Insider: Musk's X is negotiating financing at a valuation of $44 billion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to people familiar with the matter, Elon Musk's social media company X is negotiating with investors to raise funds at a valuation of $44 billion, the same price Musk bought the company for in 2022.
This round of financing will be a major turnaround for the social media giant after Musk's acquisitions and reforms caused many users and advertisers to flee. The above-mentioned people said that negotiations for a new round of X round of financing are still ongoing and details may change.
The company may also abandon financing negotiations. This is the first known round of investment since Musk took the social media company private. (Jinshi)

data.title: Karen, founder of Alfa Partnes, a one-stop crypto AI trading service provider: On-chain liquidity innovation is changing the competitive landscape between DEX and CEX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News At the Consensus HK Summit, Karen, founder of Alfa Partnes, a global one-stop encrypted AI trading service provider, said in a guest speech at the MemeX Festival that on-chain liquidity innovation is changing the competitive landscape of DEX and CEX. The current market is highly fragmented, new projects are emerging, and attention is distracted, which exacerbates volatility, and users are turning from long-term holding strategies to short-term trading trends. Investors need to flexibly adjust their strategies to cope with uncertainty. At the same time, macroeconomic factors and liquidity changes further affect the market landscape, and the role of trading service providers is particularly important. "As a guide and provider of asset management and trading services, we focus on providing AI automation services for projects and memes in the Web3 ecosystem. By providing liquidity, stabilizing the market, supporting the cold start of new projects, and optimizing price discovery, we can help users and project parties find opportunities in market uncertainty." The success of trading service providers will depend on their keen insight into market changes, refined operations on liquidity management, and the ability to respond quickly to emerging trends. In the future, they will not only be liquidity providers in the market, but also an important force to promote market innovation and efficiency.

data.title: scouter.sol spent 1,344 SOL to buy 8.12 million GREED, and the current floating loss is over 90%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, trader "scouter.sol" spent 1,344 SOL to buy 8.12 million GREED, worth $227,000. Currently, these GREED are only worth $21,700, resulting in a floating loss of $205,000 (-90%).

data.title: Google will allow users to access Bitcoin wallets through Google accounts, intends to use zero-knowledge proof technology
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Yesterday during the Hong Kong Bitcoin Technology Carnival, Google Web3 expert Kyle Song revealed that Google is working to simplify the process of using Bitcoin for Google users.
He pointed out that Google "is exploring ways to lower the entry barrier so that Web2 users can easily use Bitcoin." Song said that since the Bitcoin ETF was approved by the US SEC, the company has been working to integrate Bitcoin into its ecosystem for about a year.
According to him, Google is preparing a very simple to use solution that will seamlessly integrate cryptocurrency into the Google ecosystem used by billions of people around the world.
He explained that the Bitcoin wallet will be embedded in the Web2 interface so that users can log in to their BTC wallets with a Google account. As for encrypted payments, Google's goal is to make them as simple and intuitive as existing Web2 payment solutions.
Another focus of the Google team is to ensure the security of its solutions, and is working to "solve the trust problem between on-chain and off-chain systems." In order to maintain stable, trustless operation, Google will deploy zero-knowledge proof or similar encryption technology. (crypto.news)

data.title: Secured Finance announces strategic partnership with Axelar and Squid to jointly promote USDFC mainnet launch
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Secured Finance announced a strategic partnership with the cross-chain interoperability platform Axelar and the cross-chain exchange protocol Squid to jointly enhance the liquidity of the Filecoin ecosystem and welcome the FIL-collateralized stablecoin USDFC, which is scheduled to be launched on the mainnet in March 2025. The cooperation aims to enhance the cross-chain exchange capabilities of the Filecoin Virtual Machine (FVM) and enable seamless transfer of assets between FVM and other mainstream blockchains such as Ethereum, Cosmos, and Avalanche.
Axelar provides secure cross-chain interoperability support, while Squid provides users with a "one-step" cross-chain exchange experience based on the Axelar infrastructure. By integrating these technologies, Secured Finance will lower the threshold for user assets to enter and exit FVM, improve liquidity, and accelerate the popularization of USDFC. The launch of USDFC will provide a stable and secure on-chain transaction medium for the Filecoin ecosystem, further promoting the growth of FVM's DeFi ecosystem.
In addition, Secured Finance will launch a task-based reward activity on the Galxe platform to encourage users to participate in cross-chain bridging. In the future, Secured Finance also plans to deploy liquidity pools on platforms such as Sushiswap and Uniswap, continue to expand cross-chain functions, and help the development of the Filecoin ecosystem.

data.title: Arbitrum DAO Allocates 35 Million ARB to Stable Assets
data.description:
According to Odaily, Arbitrum DAO has announced that the community has approved the allocation of 35 million ARB tokens into various stable assets, with a total investment value of approximately $15.5 million. These funds are part of the project's Stable Treasury Donation Program (STEP), which had previously allocated 35 million ARB to investments in six products in June 2024. 

STEP is designed to invest 1% of Arbitrum DAO's funds into tokenized Real World Assets (RWA) to diversify DAO funds while leveraging industry growth for returns. The latest allocation is part of the Arbitrum DAO STEP 2.0 initiative. Combined with the 35 million ARB from STEP 1.0 and 15 million ARB managed by the treasury, the total RWA investment reaches 85 million ARB. Arbitrum DAO states that this investment is currently one of the largest for the DAO.

data.title: Today's Fear and Greed Index dropped to 44, changing from neutral to fear.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Today's Fear and Greed Index dropped to 44 (yesterday's was 47), and the level changed from neutral to panic.
Note: The threshold of the Fear Index is 0-100, including indicators: volatility (25%) + market trading volume (25%) + social media heat (15%) + market research (15%) + Bitcoin's proportion in the entire market (10%) + Google hot word analysis (10%).

data.title: Arbitrum DAO's proposal to allocate 35 million ARB to RWA investment has been approved
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Arbitrum DAO announced that the community has approved the allocation of 35 million ARB to various stable assets, with a total investment value of approximately US$15.5 million.
These funds come from the project's Stable Treasury Endowment Program (STEP), which previously allocated 35 million ARB to investments in six products in June 2024.
It is understood that STEP is a plan to invest 1% of Arbitrum DAO funds in tokenized RWAs, aiming to diversify DAO funds while taking advantage of industry growth to generate returns.
The latest allocation is part of the Arbitrum DAO STEP 2.0 plan. Together with the 35 million ARBs of STEP 1.0 and the 15 million ARBs managed by the treasury, the total investment in RWA has reached 85 million ARBs. Arbitrum DAO said that this investment is currently one of the largest investments of DAO.

data.title: Skybridge Capital founder previously invested $150,000 in L2 network Kinto
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Anthony Scaramucci, founder of Skybridge Capital, said that he is one of the early investors and supporters of the Layer2 network Kinto, and his company invested $150,000 in the platform. It is reported that the project's native token K was launched through a fair auction on February 18. In addition to Skybridge Capital, other venture capital institutions that supported the exchange's total financing of $7 million include Parafi, Spartan Group, Modular and Robot Ventures.

data.title: Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival urgently reminds you not to trust illegal ticket purchase and payment links
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival presented by Gate.io has an urgent reminder: Recently, it has been discovered that some criminals have used the name of the music festival to create fake event pages, inducing users to click on links and asking for payment.
The music festival officials attach great importance to it. In order to protect the rights and interests of the majority of users, all official ticket sales channels have been closed. Please keep your eyes open and do not trust any links that require payment. Protect your personal sensitive information. If you encounter any suspicious situation, please immediately verify the information through the official website or official customer service to prevent being deceived.
The official will strengthen security measures to ensure the smooth progress of the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival.
